events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The void behind the trench box shield is a cave-in/shield-instability hazard — non-compliant with 1926.652(c)(2)/Appendix C shield backfill requirements — so I marked it **fail / high risk** with corrective actions (evacuate, backfill void, re-inspect before re-entry).
